infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Ambient Memory captures the places you visit so you can remember your life without any effort.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Ambient Memory needs background location to passively capture memories throughout your day.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ambient Memory uses your location to name and remember the places you visit.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Ambient Memory saves share images to your library when you choose Save to photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Ambient Memory captures the places you visit so you can remember your life without any effort.
